title: Zoflora Caribbean Grapefruit & Lime Power Bathroom Cleaner, 1 x 800ml, Removes up to 100% of Limescale and Soap Scum, Leaves surfaces streak-free and sparkling
features: BURSTING WITH FRAGRANCE: Escape with a blend of exotic Caribbean Grapefruit and Lime with fruity base notes of peach and mango
LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE: This powerful, unique formula fills the room with beautiful, perfumer-developed fragrance that lasts all day
QUICK & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: removes up to 100 percent of soap scum and limescale whilst preventing further build-up of limescale leaving bathroom surfaces streak-free and sparkling
MULTI-SURFACE CLEANING: Suitable for use across multiple surfaces around the home including Bathtubs, Toilets, Showers, Sinks and Tiles
DIRECTIONS: For effective cleaning, turn nozzle to on position and keep bottle upright; Spray directly onto bathroom surfaces ensuring full coverage, then wipe away with a damp cloth or sponge

ALSO AVAILABLE IN: perfumer-developed fragrance Sweet Freesia & Jasmine Power Bathroom 800ML, and Blue Lotus & Water Lily Power Bathroom 800ML; Zoflora fills your home with a beautiful, perfumer-developed fragrance and contains patented odour elimination technology, tested against many household malodours including bins, drains and pet odours

EXPLORE THE ZOFLORA RANGE: Discover a diverse selection of captivating fragrances and specialized formulations within the Zoflora range, offering an array of choices to suit your cleaning needs; From bathroom cleaners that provide effective and hygienic cleaning to floor wipes that maintain cleanliness and freshness, and multi-purpose sprays that offer versatile cleaning solutions
description: Product Description With almost 100 years of home hygiene experience Zoflora offers all day freshness and fills your home with a beautiful long lasting scent. Zoflora Caribbean Grapefruit & Lime Power Bathroom Cleaner offers an exceptional cleaning experience, bursting with a blend of exotic Caribbean grapefuit and lime with fruity base notes of peach and mango. Designed for quick and effective cleaning, it effortlessly removes up to 100% of limescale and soap scum, while its advanced formula prevents further limescale build-up, leaving your bathroom surfaces sparkling clean and streak-free. This powerful and unique cleaner fills your space with a beautiful, perfumer-developed fragrance that lasts throughout the day, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for multi-surface cleaning, Zoflora Power Bathroom Cleaner is suitable for use on a variety of bathroom surfaces, including bathtubs, toilets, sinks, shower screens, tiles, taps, and more. It’s an ideal all-in-one solution for maintaining a pristine and fragrant home. For effective cleaning, simply turn the nozzle to the "on" position, keep the bottle upright, and spray directly onto the desired surface, ensuring complete coverage, then wipe away with a damp cloth or sponge. Additionally, Zoflora Power Bathroom Cleaner is available in alternative fragrances: Sweet Freesia and Jasmine, and Blue Lotus and Waterlily. The product also incorporates patented odour elimination technology, effectively combating common household malodours such as those from bins, drains, and pets. Zoflora invites you to explore its extensive range of cleaning products, including captivating fragrances and specialized formulations tailored to a variety of cleaning needs. Whether you need hygienic bathroom cleaners, versatile multi-purpose sprays, or convenient floor wipes, the Zoflora range provides a solution that combines superior cleaning performance with delightful, lasting fragrances. Warning Causes serious eye irritation. Always read the label and product information before use. Important information Ingredients: Per 100g Zoflora contains 0.77g Formic acid and 0.79g Lactic acid, <5% non-ionic surfactants, anionic surfactantsand perfumes. Contains linalool. Directions: Always test on an inconspicuous area first. Spray directly onto the surface ensuring full coevrage, then wipe way with a damp cloth or sponge. Do not use on glass, engraved/matte/decorated, marble, granite or damaged surfaces. Do not mix with other chemicals or cleaning products. Keep the product in its original container. Ingredients Per 100g Zoflora contains 0.77g Formic acid and 0.79g Lactic acid, <5% non-ionic surfactants, anionic surfactantsand perfumes. Contains linalool. Directions Always test on an inconspicuousarea first. Spray directly onto the surface, let it restfor 5 minutes to remove bacteria. Wipethe surface after use. Do not use on glass, engraved/matte/decorated, marble, graniteor damaged surfaces. Do notmix with other chemicals or cleaning products.Keep the product in itsoriginal container.
